textByHash.e80ab54bc04e1e8ba65b85e25921ffa7b276c68c: You want get into temple, Dorgesh-goblin?
textByHash.547b8854c76770222d18506a83f22e0dd6f251fd: Human! Where you think you going?
textByHash.54ae01e8e7bccb726afa3ec36c256ee0aa3ce989: Humans not allowed! Only goblins allowed!
textByHash.1088051fa3066001a43b8e9f28452c16c6e32def: Go away, human! We already tell you not to come in!
textByHash.12cd0cfe2a08404588e15137fddd0e52590c4e55: You not come into temple with that thing.
textByHash.c86d6dea8f4ebe8ce89abec3887c748827d44bf2: That thing you carrying! It look alive!
textByHash.2addb2b46eb6d2c77e69b9b88f0bd51fba352c12: Goblin guard: That thing! That thing that following you!
textByHash.48c12c6b9342138a4324ba2c44860fd74697430c: You go take it somewhere else before you go in.
